title: Accenture Announces Leadership Appointments
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Accenture today announced new leadership appointments, effective September 1, 2023.

title: Rise Up!, Unleashing Potential: Accenture's Unprecedented Partnership Drives Positive Change for Refugee Entrepreneurs
text: NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESSWIRE / July 27, 2023 / SkysTheLimit.org, a leading nonprofit organization committed to empowering historically excluded entrepreneurs, celebrates the tremendous success of its Rise Up! program, which focuses on supporting refugee entrepreneurs.

title: Accenture Expands Technology Strategy Capabilities with Acquisition of Strongbow Consulting
text: RIDGEWOOD, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Accenture has acquired Strongbow Consulting, a data-driven strategic advisory firm.

title: ServiceNow, NVIDIA, and Accenture team to accelerate generative AI adoption for enterprises
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ServiceNow, NVIDIA, and Accenture team to accelerate generative AI adoption for enterprises.

title: 3 Crypto Stocks to Watch in the 2023 Ethereum Rally
text: Accenture (ACN), CME Group (CME) and HIVE Digital (HIVE) are three Ethereum-exposed stocks that should be tracked as the Bitcoin rival continues to rise in 2023.

title: FSS Government Solutions Named 2023 Small Business of the Year by Accenture Federal Services
text: ARLINGTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AFS names FSS Government Solutions as its 2023 Small Business of the Year.

title: 3 Services Stocks Best-Positioned to Gain From AI, Says Analyst
text: J.P. Morgan's Tien-tsin Huang says Accenture, EPAM Systems, and Globant are the among the services companies best positioned to benefit from artificial intelligence.

title: Accenture Federal Services Wins $94M U.S. Army Identity, Credential, and Access Management (ICAM) Contract
text: ARLINGTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Accenture won a $94 million U.S. Army contract to maintain and transform the agency's Identity, Credential, and Access Management system.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Cruising Towards A 20% Return
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF™, with a few minor twists. The portfolio gained 5.00% in June, underperforming the S&P 500 by 1.60%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 11.99% and trailing the S&P 500 by 4.90%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating 3.56% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: Strategic Enhancements Aid Accenture (ACN) Amid Competition
text: Accenture is experiencing growth in outsourcing and consulting, driven by demand for efficient, cost-saving services. Intense competition poses threats to company?

title: Accenture Federal Services Wins $98M Defense Health Agency Award
text: ARLINGTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Accenture won a $98 million award from the Defense Health Agency to operate and enhance the Joint Medical Common Operating Picture.
